info.title: Collision Engineers OCR Host
info.description: Custom connector over the Collision Engineers OCR host (Azure Functions on Azure Container Apps). Two operations: OcrPdf turns an image-only instruction PDF into text (and, when the engine is present, the 12-field EVA extraction) using in-container Tesseract or the managed Document Intelligence Read fallback; PlateOcr reads a UK registration plate from an overview vehicle photo (fast-alpr, or DI Read fallback) to set Evidence registrationVisible and VRM-match images. OCR_SCANNED_PDF_ENABLED / PLATE_OCR_ENABLED gating is enforced in the calling flow/Code App, NOT here.

post.description: Decode a base64 image-only PDF, run OCR (Tesseract in-container, or Document Intelligence Read when OCR_PROVIDER=docintel), and return the recognised text plus — when the parser engine is present in the image — the 12-field EVA extraction with provenance and the Case-identity vrm/reference. Invoke ONLY as a fallback for PDFs whose text extraction yielded ~no text.

200.description: OCR result (extraction may be null when only raw text was produced).

400.description: Bad input (missing/invalid document, non-PDF filename, bad base64, bad JSON).

post.summary: Read a registration plate from a vehicle photo
post.description: Decode a base64 overview photo and read the UK registration plate (fast-alpr detector+OCR, or Document Intelligence Read when PLATE_PROVIDER=docintel). Returns registration_visible (write to Evidence registrationVisible) and, when case_vrm is supplied, vrm_match (drives image-to-Case correlation / WhatsApp bulk match). M1 scope: recognition only — role tagging and reflection detection are M2.

200.description: Plate read result (registration_visible false when no plate found).

400.description: Bad input (missing/invalid image, unsupported filename, bad base64, bad JSON).

document.description: Base64-encoded image-only PDF bytes. DO NOT add `format: byte` or `x-ms-media-kind: File` to this param: the Power Platform gateway then re-encodes the base64 a SECOND time and the host's decode yields garbage bytes (the same setting broke CS Parse intake 2026-06-19 — see the parser connector). The calling flow passes the RAW base64 string, NOT `@base64ToBinary(...)` (which feeds the gateway binary and 400s). The host's `_peel_double_base64` is TOLERANT (peels a redundant 2nd base64 layer, logging each recovery) — that tolerant decode is the load-bearing safeguard. See memory `powerplatform-connector-base64-double-encode`.

provider_hint.description: Optional provider id or name to bias provider detection (engine path only).

FieldCell.description: One EVA field value with provenance.

source.description: Extraction rule id / provenance label, or 'absent' when not supplied.

Extraction.description: The settled 12-field EVA extraction (present only when the engine ran). Keys in contract order.

vrm.description: Case-identity (correlation/dedup). NOT part of the EVA payload.

reference.description: Case-identity (correlation/dedup). NOT part of the EVA payload.

ocr_text.description: Full recognised text from the OCR engine.

image.description: Base64-encoded vehicle photo bytes (jpg/jpeg/png/bmp/tif/tiff/heif/heic/webp). DO NOT add `format: byte` or `x-ms-media-kind: File`: the Power Platform gateway then double-encodes the base64 and the plate read fails (the same landmine the parser connector hit). The caller passes the RAW base64 string (NOT `@base64ToBinary(...)`); the host's tolerant magic-byte/second-peel decode recovers a double-encoded payload either way. See memory `powerplatform-connector-base64-double-encode`.

filename.description: Original filename WITH a supported image extension.

case_vrm.description: Optional case registration to match against (normalised: uppercase, alphanumerics only).

plate_text.description: Best plate read (display form). Empty when none found.

registration_visible.description: A plausible registration plate was read. Write to Evidence registrationVisible.

vrm_match.description: true/false when case_vrm supplied; null otherwise. Drives image-to-Case correlation.

apiKeyHeader.name: x-functions-key
apiKeyHeader.description: Azure Functions host/function key, stored on the custom connection. Never embedded in this definition.

x-ms-connector-metadata.propertyValue: FUNCTION-level auth: the connector sends the function key as x-functions-key. Two operations share one connection. Gating (OCR_SCANNED_PDF_ENABLED / PLATE_OCR_ENABLED) is enforced upstream in the flow/Code App.
